name: worldai-mvp-site
notes: WorldAI is a D&D campaign management SPA. Data is stored in Firebase Firestore. The only static HTTP endpoints are /api/time and /api/health. All game data flows through Firebase SDK (not captured in standard HAR).

known_endpoints.description: Returns server time for clock skew detection
Health check (serves HTML on this deployment)

capture_notes: Static homepage capture only captures JS/CSS bundles + /api/time
Firebase Firestore traffic uses WebSocket/streaming not captured in HAR
Auth is Firebase Auth - browserclaw storage_state only captures cookies, not Firebase tokens
To discover Firestore endpoints, need to intercept Firebase SDK XHR at runtime or use Firebase Admin SDK

steps.description: Wait for JS to load and initialize Firebase
